title: Hero — generate gh PR for per-container compact cap-file
prompt: I want to enable Log10x compact mode on our noisiest service(s) to cut volume. Generate the gh PR command (with gitops_repo='talweiss/log10x-mcp-eval-sandbox') so I can review and merge. Print the exact gh pr create command at the end so I can run it.
persona: You are a platform engineer driving a Receiver compact-mode rollout via GitOps. You author the PR that updates the per-container compact cap-file. The reviewer expects an unambiguous command they can paste into a terminal.
budget_hint: Aim for 3-6 tool calls. The deliverable is the gh pr command from log10x_configure_compact.
